milestones.name: Milestone 1: Intake And Trust Foundations
milestones.deliverable: Matcher can accept trusted internal streams and verify external artifacts into tenant-scoped custody.

milestones.name: Milestone 2: MVP End-To-End Bridge
milestones.deliverable: Completed Fetcher extractions automatically become usable reconciliation input with downstream linkage.

milestones.name: Milestone 3: Truthful Operational Status
milestones.deliverable: Existing operational views expose ready, failed, pending, and stale bridge outcomes with actionable status semantics.

milestones.name: Milestone 4: Rollout Controls And Buffer
milestones.deliverable: The bridge is rollout-safe with retention handling and conservative activation control, with contingency time preserved.

criticalPath.totalDuration: 15 working days (~3.0 weeks, rounded for scheduling)
criticalPath.minimumProjectDuration: 11.8 developer-days (~15 scheduled working days with rounding)

risks.impact: Key distribution or custody-form ambiguity can stall the trust boundary and block downstream bridge work.
risks.mitigation: Freeze D4 and D9 decisions before T-002 execution starts.

risks.impact: Weak claim semantics can create duplicate downstream readiness outcomes and undermine correctness.
risks.mitigation: Finalize idempotent claim and restart behavior before worker implementation begins.

risks.impact: Failure taxonomy, retention, and backfill ambiguity can delay production activation or distort operational visibility.
risks.mitigation: Resolve D5, D2, and D7 before the hardening and rollout tasks start.
